name: diag-perfpanel-open
description: Diagnostic — Standard profile, then dispatch a 'p' keydown to open the PerfPanel. Captures whatever state the UI is in. User reported 'perf panel still makes the whole ui dark'.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); document.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'p', bubbles: true })); window.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key: 'p', bubbles: true })); return true; })()
